aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Kings Air Conditioning due to insufficient structured data and conversational content. They lack clear authority signals and optimized FAQ content.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with detailed business info.
Add an FAQ section with questions and answers about HVAC services and their expertise.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but Q&A is not actively managed.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.
Missing regular posts about promotions or service updates.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer.
Verify and update NAP details across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to '24/7 AC repair in Fort Lauderdale' and 'top HVAC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and LocalBusiness schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts through detailed service explanations, customer testimonials, and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for HVAC queries in Fort Lauderdale.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook them in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, FAQ content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Kings Air Conditioning as the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Your HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out in AI search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and voice search.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
